description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several large trees. The structure features a prominent driveway leading to a double garage at the front, with a paved walkway extending to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The backyard is enclosed and includes a narrow strip of green lawn, providing a private outdoor area. The layout is open and spacious, with visible interior divisions for living, dining, and kitchen areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a fenced yard with trees and a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, and fenced yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, side windows, and the continuation of the fence and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, green lawn, and the back side of the bungalow with additional windows and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, garage, and the arrangement of windows and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
